programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La cita de Karime y Fernanda da un giro inesperado, y el grupo se dirige a una fiesta. Un visitante causa sensación, y Jacky lo invita a la casa, pero los chicos se sienten incómodos y quieren sacarlo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores happily celebrate their last night in Guadalajara, since they will head out to Vallarta the next day. No one suspects that, there, the family will break up forever.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: The dysfunctional owners of the O Face Bar are so inexperienced and chaotic Jon doesn't even know if he wants to save their business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Faced with a PDA-obsessed manager and an owner solely focused on his own retirement, the staff at Pat's Cocktails calls Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Maria Menounos helps Jon scope out a bar whose owner sits around as her husband does all the work and her dad picks up the bill.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Katy, Texas, to save Bryant's Ice House, which is plagued by a bad reputation, an even worse location and a wild staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's crew gets caught in the middle of a massive brawl at a New York sports bar when the customers discover they're being served cheap booze at premium prices.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deflate the ego of a Puerto Rican bar owner who berates his staff and sons as his bar sinks further into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Queens dive, Jon has to quell the raging tempers of three loudmouthed, firefighting brothers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon shows up to help a former Philadelphia detective turned bar owner who has been hitting the bottle too hard after years on the force.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon enlists a failing bar owner's ex-wife and former manager to help get the business back on course.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An outrageous owner spends more time swinging from the rafters than managing his bar, and Jon is ready to abandon the rescue if the owner doesn't face reality.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third-generation Milwaukee bar owner takes his father's legacy for granted and refuses to take on the inherited mantle of leadership.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh suspects Sasha, an attractive tourist, of murdering her husband. Betraying Leigh, Jason seduces Sasha with shocking results! Sean is shocked when he discovers the truth about his ex-wife's visit to Hawaii.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A series of fake rescue calls puts Sean, Jenna and Zack’s lives in danger. Jenna replaces Councilman McKenna, giving her the power to shut down the Training Center! JD tries to get Kekoa’s father to bless their relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Carrie rescues a spearfisherman who starts obsessively stalking her. Sean, Jason, and Zack save her from his deadly pursuit, but can Carrie feel safe saving strangers again? Sean is jealous of Sam dating Leigh, but Leigh has doubts about Sam.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Baywatch faces two bizarre lawsuits. Kekoa’s father wants her to break up with JD and quit lifeguarding. Zack runs the new Junior Lifeguards program. A government Investigation puts Sean’s job and the future of the Training Center in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A hurricane hits Hawaii. Sean and Jenna get trapped in a WWII bunker and must put their hatred aside and work together to escape. Zack is trapped in headquarters with a thrill-seeking reporter that puts their lives in danger to get her story.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jenna invests all her money with an investment banker who turns out to be a con man. Derek Hart is the kind of man JD wishes he was. But when Derek jumps off a cliff, JD and Jason dive in to save his life, in more ways than one!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Zack corrupts the headquarters’ computer system forcing everyone to work in the Dark Ages. Sean is freaked because a major donor is about to arrive in the midst of chaos. Jason saves Brit from her ex.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued bodyboarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Investigating toxic dumping, Sean and Leigh end up chained inside a chamber slowly filling with toxic seawater. Can Sam get them out in time? To raise money, Jason and Zack have to hula dance in grass skirts in front of a lot of women.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Bellator 246: Archuleta vs Mix
programme.desc: A bantamweight world title is on the line as hard-charging Juan “The Spaniard” Archuleta collides with undefeated submission machine Patchy “No Love” Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena. Reigning Bellator Heavyweight World Champion and former Bellator Light Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on MMA leg-end Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida in a rematch over eight years in the making.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena as newly crowned Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Champion Juan 'The Spaniard' Archuleta puts his belt on the line against the Sergio'S.P' Pettis. Also Anthony 'Rumble' Johnson makes his Bellator MMA debut in the Grand Prix as he battles Jose 'Gugu' Augusto.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Champion Cris Cyborg puts her belt on the line against Leslie 'The Peacemaker' Smith. Former Bantamweight World Champion Darrion 'The Wolf' Caldwell makes his return in a showdown with Leandro 'Alter' Higo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Welterweight World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima puts his belt on the line against undefeated Ukrainian Yaroslav 'Dynamo' Amo-sov. Legendary knockout artist Paul 'Semtex' Daley collides with Jason 'The Ass Kicking Machine' Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Interim Heavyweight World Champion-ship is up for grabs as Tim Johnson collides with Fedor Team protege Valentin Moldavsky. Also Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche returns to the Bellator MMA cage to battle undefeated Japanese sensation Kana Watanabe.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's interview with death row inmate Rodney Reed continues. Reed's attorney, Bryce Benjet tells what he thinks happened to Stacey. Retired NYPD detective Kevin Gannon & criminologist Dr. Lee Gilbertson say they know who killed Stacey & how.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kirby made headlines -- and spent 13 weeks in jail -- after his wife, Renee, videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. Hear why Kirby claims Renee left him no choice but to act as he did. Plus, what other behavior did Renee catch on camera? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Actress Lindsay Lohan's mom, Dina, has been accused of being a bad mom, to riding the coattails of her daughter. Dina sets the record straight & reveals details inside her marriage to Michael. Plus, meet a woman who says Michael is her child's father.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valerie says daughter, Alyssa, 19, is a lazy mom refusing to get a job & falls asleep on the couch, leaving her baby unattended. And actor Antonia Sabato Jr. discusses his campaign for a new law banning medical marijuana in homes with children under 18.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Angie & Hannah who say step-father & step-grandfather Ralph routinely sexually abused them. For the first time in 15 years, Angie & Hannah are face-to-face with Ralph, who denies all claims. Is Ralph cleared by a polygraph test?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest topics like why Cher says she shouldn't be called an icon and the recent opinion piece on tipping that has people debating.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side in a special Game Changers Edition of Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by legendary musician Lionel Richie! "Saturday Night Live" star Sarah Sherman is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew-gooder segment, Drew has a big surprise for a mother-daughter duo who are empowering and providing resources to underprivileged children and families in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The People we Hate at the Wedding" stars Ben Platt and Dustin Milligan stop by to chat about their new film. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pretty Baby" star Brooke Shields is telling Drew all about her new documentary and is joined by executive producer of the film Ali Wentworth.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Culinary legend Ina Garten joins Drew at the news desk to break down the latest food headlines including desserts only invites and the gravestone recipe trend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when "Enola Homes 2" star Mille Bobby Brown, joins Drew in her mini- van to chat while cruising around NYC dishing on her worst fear, her dream role, which "Stranger Things" cast member is her bff and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines like the company in Mumbai that fines employees for contacting co-workers after hours and the course that can help you overcome sexy texting anxiety.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity stylist Chris Appleton and Drew are doing a five-minute face makeover! Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: t's Drew-love with Melanie Lynskey and Jason Ritter who are reflecting on their relationship over the years, growing their family and supporting each other through tough times.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines like the reactions to the "Barbie" trailer and the popular new meetup event called "the not working experience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Weird: The Al Yankovic Story" star Daniel Radcliffe stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross cover news about a senior dance troupe and a Jet-Puffed marshmallow pillow. Mark Anderson and Ryan Fey make skirt steak tacos. Damona Hoffman and Drew answer red flag questions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants a new identity with the replacement of their old truck with a modern hot rod. Granny wants to stay with the old truck. To prove how good the old truck is, Granny races Jethro in his hot rod.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts prepare to go to Hooterville for Christmas.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale follows the Clampetts and Miss Jane to Hooterville where they are spending Christmas. He takes Ellie's bear Fairchild with him and gets himself thrown in jail in a little town. Sam Drucker shows up to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is sick, and Dr. Granny springs into action with a chimp as a nurse. But Ellie's bear Fairchild has taken a liking to granny's flu remedy. During this, Mrs. Drysdale tries to impress society Mrs. Van Ransonhoff.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive in the mountain town of Silver Dollar City, where Granny starts a feud with an old rival, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Bird watcher Jane Hathaway hikes into the woods and finds a man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts rehearse for Elly May's wedding to backwoodsman Matthew Templeton, unaware that banker Drysdale wants it stopped.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale and Jane arrive in New York to persuade the hillbillies to abandon their half-built cabin in Central Park and return home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny uses her shotgun as she punishes Jethro for leading too wild a Hollywood life with Shorty Kellems.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kenny orders Valerie to terminate her pregnancy. Steve is miffed when Clare chooses to go to the Halloween concert with egotistical Dick Harrison. Brandon and Tracy spend time together at the club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Steve overhears Val discussing her pregnancy on the phone. David's grandfather leaves him $250,000 and a 1961 Thunderbird. An uncomfortable Tracy decides to quit her TV job after Brandon nixes a relationship.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon goes to see Kenny, who portrays himself as an innocent victim caught on the web of an evil vixen. Mel, worried by David's newfound wealth, asks Donna to keep an eye on him. Steve impresses Clare with his dedication as he trains for the crew race.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: During must see a psychiatrist after displaying hostile behavior. Mel agrees with the doctor's recommendation that David be held 72 hours for observation. Steve faces plagiarism charges. The gang helps Willie build a house.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Steve elects to plead guilty, leaving his punishment to the lenient Chancellor Arnold. Brandon refuses to plead guilty to a crime he did not commit, and faces a hearing and possible expulsion. Felice objects to Donna's renewed relationship with David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Donna believes she has solved the mystery of her stalker's identity when she sees Garrett Slan, the man who tried to rape her, at the university.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Donna's request for a permanent restraining order against Slan is denied. Tracy accidentally tells Brandon that she loves him. Steve and Clare consider living together as they spend a weekend house sitting. David takes an interest in a young singer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Donna's stalker confesses and holds the entire staff of the TV station hostage.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Kelly each confess their feelings to friends, but expect the other person to make a move. Donna tries to reconcile with David. Steve and Clare double date with Ryan and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Donna and David visit her grandmother in San Luis Obispo. Noting a striking resemblance between David and her late husband, Mrs. Martin tells the couple about her romance with Donna's grandfather.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Joey returns to the beach apartment. Rob irritates his manager by seeking Val's advice about whether to sign on for a new movie. Jim and Cindy invite Brandon to spend spring vacation in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Tracy visit Jim in Hong Kong; Cindy is in London helping Brenda cope with mononucleosis. Clare and Steve encourage Kelly to go out instead of moping around the apartment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Mariah comes to town to give a lecture at the university's new age festival. She develops an instant connection with Kelly, prompting Tracy to bristle. David tries to plan a special evening for Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon has to take care of Kelly and Valerie, who are both laid up with the flu. The girls discuss the reasons for their feud.

When a rich old man's fancy turns to thoughts of love and marriage, fiscally-minded Sandra must decide if making her geriatric suitor's final days happy is worth giving up her playgirl lifestyle.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El último acto de terrorismo a los cuarteles de NCIS perpetrado por Harper Dearing en el final de la temporada pasada, provoca que diferentes agencias se unan en su búsqueda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la causa de una misteriosa muerte que involucra a un empleado de armería de NCIS que fue descubierto cuatro meses después del atentado a los campos de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Aún en su licencia médica, Ducky decide re abrir un caso de hace 12 años ordenando la exhumación de un comandante de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el caso de un entrenamiento de helicóptero que termina en desastre en alta mar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando aparecen víctimas de disparos en el área de Los Ángeles en una posible relación con actividades criminales, la UAC busca a un justiciero sospechoso.

programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man learns a hard lesson about wearing his seatbelt, and police perform a traffic stop and uncover a sad man with a strange story.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.desc: Un violento asesinato en el aparcamiento de un casino y otro episodio en la sala de interrogatorios de la policía llevan a los CSI a un sorprendente descubrimiento tras otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una montaña rusa se sale de la vía y deja seis muertos. El equipo de CSI investiga si se trata de un accidente o de juego sucio.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Tin Tan y las modelos
programme.desc: Tin-Tan y su esposa Severa son los directores del Patronato de la Moral y Etica Social. Sin embargo Tin-Tan tuvo como antepasado a Casanova, quien le da tres maravillosas lecciones de amor con tres hermosas jovenes, Rosa, Teresa y Mapita.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: El lamento de la serpiente negra
programme.desc: En este relato sobre el amor, el candidato para el Premio Óscar(r) Samuel L. Jackson y Christina Ricci buscan la redención en el sur profundo a través del poder del blues y la transcendencia de una extraña amistad.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: Legalmente rubias
programme.desc: Cuando dos primas británicas se mudan a Los Ángeles, se dan cuenta que para triunfar en la secundaria deben demostrar que las rubias no sólo se divierten más, sino que son más listas.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Showgirls: lo prohibido
programme.desc: Conflictos de seducción, pasión y poder se revelan cuando los creadores de 'Instinto Básico' destapan el aparentemente glamoroso mundo del espectáculo en Las Vegas con esta controvertida película protagonizada por Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Las Aparicio: La película
programme.desc: La exitosa serie “Las Aparicio” se traduce al cine y narra la historia de una familia de mujeres, pero; víctimas de una maldición, son viudas y no pueden concebir niños varones, por lo que deben unirse para resolver el secreto detrás de su viejo hogar.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Peligro en Bangkok
programme.desc: Joe (Nicolas Cage) es un asesino profesional que aterriza en Bangkok para ocuparse de unas obligaciones y se encuentra inesperadamente entrenando a un joven protegido y enamorándose de una mujer que desconoce su verdadero trabajo.

programme.title: La Hummer asesina
programme.desc: Todas las noches Gonzalo y un grupo de amigos, todos ellos pertenecientes a poderosas familias, recorren las calles a bordo de una Hummer para asesinar a todos los indigentes que se encuentran a su paso por un supuesto mandato divino.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Las motitos
programme.desc: Juliana y Lautaro viven en un humilde barrio asediado por la policía, están enamorados y se enfrentan a un embarazo no deseado.

programme.title: Santa Clara
programme.desc: Santiago, un hombre misterioso que trabaja como vaquero, acepta conducir 2000 cabezas de ganado al rancho Santa Clara. Pero ir allí significa dejar atrás su pasado o tomar venganza contra quienes lo obligaron a partir.

programme.title: Operación Overlord
programme.desc: Nada puede prepararte para el caos alucinante de Operación Overlord. El mega productor J.J. Abrams crea un emocionante viaje retorcido sobre un equipo de tropas estadounidenses que se encuentran cara a cara con los súper soldados nazis nunca vistos.

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: The Prophecy
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar Christopher Walken protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural donde las fuerzas del cielo y el infierno luchan por la humanidad. Solo un excura detective y una niña podrán frenar al ángel negro Gabriel (Walken) y salvar el mundo.

programme.title: La profecía 2: soldados de Dios
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar, Christopher Walken, regresa como el amenazante ángel Gabriel. Cuando los poderes del bien y del mal descienden a la Tierra en una lucha por la humanidad, la única esperanza es el hijo nonato de una inocente (Jennifer Beals).

programme.title: La profecía 3: el ascenso
programme.desc: Christopher Walken protagoniza en The Ascent, la tercera película de la saga, La profecía. Mientras los ángeles desatan la guerra en la Tierra, un semi-humano descubre por su ángel guardián Gabriel, que deberá salvar el mundo.

programme.title: La Profecía 4: La Revelación
programme.desc: Cuando un antiguo manuscrito religioso cae en las manos de una joven ignorante, pronto ella se verá metida en el centro de una batalla épica entre ángeles caídos despiadados, que moverán el cielo y tierra para obtener el libro de las profecías.

programme.title: La profecía: los olvidados
programme.desc: La saga épica de, La profecía, concluye con esta quinta y electrizante película. Cuando un antiguo libro de profecías predice la llegada del Anticristo, un grupo de ángeles caídos se dispone a cazarlo y capturarlo.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber Of Fleet Street
programme.desc: Depp interpreta el personaje que da nombre a la película, un hombre enviado injustamente a prisión que jura venganza, no solo por su castigo, sino también por las devastadoras consecuencias para su esposa e hija.

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?
programme.desc: Harto de malas relaciones, Wallace (Daniel Radcliffe), que abandonó su carrera de medicina, decide poner su vida amorosa en pausa. Tras enamorarse de Chantry (Zoe Kazan), una animadora que vive con su novio Ben (Rafe Spall), el "amor" se complica.

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Clerks
programme.desc: La famosa película independiente que lanzó la carrera de Kevin Smith y se ganó al público por su energía franca, comedia extravagante y música a la moda, Clerks muestra un humor ingenioso y el debut de los íconos populares Jay y Bob el silencioso.

programme.title: Duro de vender (el que no enseña no vende)
programme.desc: El lisonjero vendedor Don Ready (Jeremy Piven) y su alocado equipo de cerradores tienen un fin de semana para vender más de 200 autos y demostrar que cuando se trata de estafar, conspirar y de usar todo tipo de artimañas, ¡ellos tienen lo necesario!

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Lilies of the Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: Birdman Of Alcatraz
programme.desc: Burt Lancaster stars in the true story of killer Robert Stroud, who spent 43 years in solitary confinement at Alcatraz, and who educated himself, becoming a world renowned authority on birds. Thelma Ritter, Telly Savalas and Karl Malden co-star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar's bowling team, the "Bon Vivants," battle the "Kingpins" for the championship in a game which marks the first time in five years the Bon Vivantshave a chance to win.

programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A golfer is brutally attacked and Cutter and his team fear that an aerial predator is at large. The pressure is on to find the perpetrator, but when they make the wrong call, Cutter and Claudia discover that they could be the next victims.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A quick and ruthless predator with supernatural powers presents the team with their deadliest threat yet.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives on 21st Century Earth where all long-distance journeys are made instantaneously by T-Mat. But aliens have invaded the T-Mat relay station on the Moon...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: An Ice Warrior invasion fleet is on its way to the Moon. Back on Earth, the Doctor devises a plan to destroy the Martian fungus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces with resistance fighters from various time zones and prepare to launch an attack on Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor sends Zoe to the war zones to assemble a resistance force. The Doctor remains in Central Control to steal the processing machine, but the War Chief is one step ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie, and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone, but General Smythe is waiting for them and opens fire on them with a machine gun.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the War Chief who belongs to the same race of people as the Doctor and offers an alliance. In the 1917 zone fighters prepare to attack Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: Transported to a parallel world, the Doctor discovers that England is under military rule and the drilling project is at a more advanced stage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Bruce arrives back from the US and Amanda shows him around the lodge and the progress that has been made…and then the rains come.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The interior of Madagascar is dry and mountainous, and the forests that grow here lose their leaves during the dry season, except for those that take refuge in narrow canyons eroded by rivers. These unique forests are home to ring-tailed lemurs.

programme.title: Vicious Beauties - The Secret World of Jellyfish
programme.desc: Watching the graceful movement of these gelatinous animals is almost hypnotic. Although their bodies are 98% water, jellyfish are deceptively clever and dangerous. But where do these primordial creatures come from?

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Bred from wolves, Huskies have helped humans carve out an existence in Alaska's desolate wilderness. These dogs still maintain many physical adaptations of their wild ancestors, enabling them to withstand the fierce conditions of the Alaskan winter.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven visits Santa Maria, the world's tallest coastal mountain, which is home to many creatures found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: Japan: The Sense Of Season
programme.desc: Spring and Summer

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: Over millions of years, nature has evolved to deal with the strongest storms on the planet. This episode looks at varying strategies used by plants and animals that live in the hurricane zone and how they cope with the annual onslaught.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time in the Cheetah diaries, Chobe, who seemed to be in the running to be the next top cat, contracts a mystery illness. Meanwhile, the cheetah cubs have to be kept in isolation, missing out on some crucial training.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: For years, at least four highly elusive wolf packs have lived and hunted on the edge of the wild city of Anchorage. But as the city spreads further and further into wolf country, the wolves are now getting bolder.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds – forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the waters of a mighty river: the Orinoco.

programme.title: A New Prehistory
programme.desc: Where do birds come from?

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Penya and Paza encounter a python; the adorable cubs go on their first bush outing; Lewa and Laili keep the zebra on their toes. Meanwhile, the research team have more experiments for the Ngamo lions.

programme.title: New Life: Born to Run
programme.desc: In a land of dangers, plant-eating animals are always at risk, and never more so than at the time of their birth; out on the open they are vulnerable and there are few places to hide. But luckily some are born to run...

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Dre remains in federal custody; Jason instructs Tommy and Ghost to kidnap Alicia Jiminez; Tommy teaches LaKeisha the drug game; Tariq's business begins to flourish; Tasha has a business plan of her own.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha sparks a new flame; Ghost utilizes his resources in an attempt to kill Tommy; Tariq's in over his head with the Italians; Dre forms an unlikely alliance; Proctor hatches a plan to gain custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha revisits old habits when she begins to recruit soldiers for her new empire; Tariq pulls a ruse on Vincent; Proctor warns Tommy about a snitch; Ghost plans to take care of the snitch on his own terms.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After being duped by Tariq, Vincent holds Tariq hostage; Ghost and Tommy call a temporary truce in order to face a common enemy; Tasha puts her differences to the side and turns to an unlikely ally for help.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tasha butt heads on how to raise Tariq; Tate gets caught with his pants down; LaKeisha creates new enemies within Tommy's organization; Jason tasks Ghost and Tommy to work together.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The Feds turn the heat up on Tommy and scare LaKeisha into cooperating; Ghost discontinues a relationship with an ally; Tasha confronts a snitch, which hits a little too close to home.

programme.desc: Jess and Brooke investigate the disappearance of a woman from a plane while in flight.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Brooke and Jess search for a woman whose husband was blown up in his car.

programme.title: Tengo talento, mucho talento
programme.desc: Grandes artistas hispanos muestran su talento frente a famosos jueces, pero al final será el público quien consagre al ganador.

programme.title: Alarma TV
programme.desc: Un show de revista de media hora que se transmite de lunes a sábado donde se presentan noticias únicas de lo que acontece alrededor del mundo.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Tengo talento, mucho talento
programme.desc: Grandes artistas hispanos muestran su talento frente a famosos jueces, pero al final será el público quien consagre al ganador.

programme.title: Alarma TV
programme.desc: Un show de revista de media hora que se transmite de lunes a sábado donde se presentan noticias únicas de lo que acontece alrededor del mundo.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Programa de juegos en donde los concursantes compiten en desafíos de un minuto con niveles crecientes de dificultad para tener la oportunidad de ganar un premio en efectivo.

programme.title: Noches con Platanito
programme.desc: Un talk show cómico, diferente y entretenido con Platanito, quien entrevistará a importantes personajes de la farándula, concursos y rutinas de comedia.

programme.title: Los mochadedos: La industria del secuestro
programme.desc: Historia de secuestradores como trabajan y estudian a sus victimas para exigir el dinero de su rescate, torturandolos, mutilandolos y en ocasiones hasta matándolos.

programme.title: Encrucijada
programme.desc: Historias reales sobre la bifurcación del camino de diferentes personas, que llevan a cambios en el futuro y hacen frente a una encrucijada.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: A que no puedes
programme.desc: Emocionante juego que enfrenta a dos equipos de celebridades en su intento por realizar pruebas y retos únicos. El equipo que complete con éxito la tarea, ganará dinero para una obra de ayuda social.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Mi sueño es bailar
programme.desc: Celebridades ayudan a los participantes a hacer sus sueños realidad. Durante cada episodio la pareja con más puntos obtiene la oportunidad de escoger cual sueño se hará realidad.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a beam above the water and must make their way around the structure. Contestant will climb through a plexi-glass tunnel. A struss structure will be wrapped by cargo netting and hung beneath a 212 helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Stunt takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. Couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo load ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over the water. Contestants must make their way through a maze. Contestants must climb into the back of a car that is slowly filling with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is placed in a coffin, lowered into a grave, and their partner must free them. The contestants will be placed into a 7-foot deep Plexiglas tank divided into two sections and filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: For this Psycho Arc couples stunt, a hearse will be specially fabricated with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will be on their knees inside a plexiglas tank. Contestants will be standing in a plexi box that is suspended over water.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
